core_payload.content:
# Symphony Agent Session

## 1. Role
Symphony Agent Session will become the durable live execution envelope for one coding-agent conversation inside one repository assignment, visible across terminal, web, mobile, and control-plane surfaces while work is still in flight.

## 2. Future Session Contract
Sessions will carry assignment handles, richer event and artifact projection, degraded-state visibility, clearer return paths, and stronger linkage between session telemetry, review requests, and downstream operator surfaces.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Symphony will move from tracking a live thread to managing a searchable, accountable session object whose running state, outputs, failures, and recovery paths remain visible throughout execution.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Symphony Agent Session supports To Dig Deep by making live coding work stateful, inspectable, and attributable while it is still happening.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Symphony Agent Session defines the future live execution envelope for repository work: assignment handles, richer artifact projection, degraded-session state, cross-surface continuity, and clearer linkage between active coding work and the control surfaces that supervise it.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
